title: [MTR4] The PäRail Trains Addon
description: a Fictional Resource Pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod
body:
***VERSION 1.3.0 ONLY WORKS WITH 4.0.0, FOR 3.2.2, USE 1.2.x***

![The PäRail Trains Addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be8e62f3d22d3a576ec2d4b7990f862e008452ce.png)

The PäRail Trains Addon is a Resource Pack Addon for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod adding a Multitude of Fictional Locomotives, MU's, And HSR Units to the Mod. Including Freight.

This Resource Pack requires the [Minecraft Transit Railway Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) to Function.

This Pack contains Assets from: CX332, navi9702, meifwong, and AIDA64S. Those assets are able to be used separately.

The Pack Contains Multible Locomotives, and Multible Units.

Need Support? Visit our [Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/63URQWxwHP)

This pack is Only Provided officaly through Modrinth. if you got this Pack past 1.0.1 From another site, It was not uploaded Officially.

2.4.0 now Includes a JCM PIDS Script!
